generated_exposure.exposure_text: As a former intelligence analyst, I've seen firsthand how critical strategic autonomy is for our national security. When I was stationed overseas, we relied on allies who later proved unreliable. Investing in our own capabilities isn't just about strength—it's about ensuring we're never caught unprepared again. #NationalSecurity #StrategicAutonomy
